incident_summary: Tablet press AC-175 punch wear resulted in weight variation OOS during compression of batch C3787B. RSD 3.6% against limit 2%. 7% of tablets outside ±5% weight limit.
root_cause_detail: Punches worn beyond allowable limit. No intermediate wear measurement performed between batches. Wear only detected at batch failure.
corrective_action: Compression halted. Worn punches replaced. Batch 100% weight-sorted; OOS tablets rejected. Replacement punches qualified before restart.
preventive_action: Punch wear gauge check added to start-up procedure and every 2 hours mid-run. Punch replacement triggered at 80% of maximum wear limit.
effectiveness_check: Zero punch-wear-related OOS events on this press for 12 months. Punch inspection records reviewed on monthly QA audit.
